event: The Road to Jerusalem: Angel Leading the Crusaders
symbols: luminous angel with banner — divine guidance and heavenly mandate
vast army stretching to the horizon — the scale of the military pilgrimage
night setting — the darkness through which the faithful march by divine light
raised spears and weapons — the militant dimension of medieval pilgrimage
description: A detailed black and white engraving showing a vast army marching at night, viewed from a low angle. Above the army, a luminous winged angel hovers with arms spread wide, holding a banner or standard, radiating brilliant light that illuminates the dark sky. The soldiers below carry spears, shields, and helmets, packed densely in ranks that stretch far into the background. The angel’s wings span wide against the night sky, and the overall effect is of divine intervention guiding a massive military force.
